use base64::{Engine as _, engine::general_purpose};

fn store_token(token: &[u8]) -> String {
    general_purpose::STANDARD.encode(token)
}

fn retrieve_token(encoded: &str) -> Vec<u8> {
    general_purpose::STANDARD.decode(encoded).unwrap()
}

// GOOD: base64 used for cross-boundary transport, raw bytes used in-process
fn send_to_remote_service(token: &[u8]) {
    let encoded = store_token(token);
    http_post("https://auth.example.com/token", encoded.as_bytes());
}

fn receive_from_remote_service(encoded: &str) -> Vec<u8> {
    retrieve_token(encoded)
}

fn process_auth_local(token: &[u8]) {
    // Use raw bytes for in-process operations
    cache_insert("auth_token", token);
    validate_token(token);
}
